name: Swan Energy Limited
summary: Swan Energy Limited engages in the textile, real estate, and energy businesses in India. It manufactures and markets cotton and polyester textile products; and develops commercial and residential real estate properties. The company also constructs and operates LNG Port terminal at Jafrabad port area in the Amreli district of Gujarat with a total capacity of 5 MMTPA. In addition, it engages in the trading of gas commodities, etc.; and mining activities. The company was formerly known as Swan Mills Limited. Swan Energy Limited was incorporated in 1909 and is based in Mumbai, India.
